name: unity-cli
description: Unity Editor automation via unity-cli — scene inspection, GameObject editing, prefab workflows, C# navigation/editing, asset management, input system, testing, and UI automation.

methods.name: cargo
methods.command: MSVC_LINK=$(find '/c/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio' '/c/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio' -name 'link.exe' -path '*/Hostx64/x64/*' 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$MSVC_LINK" ]; then export PATH="$(dirname "$MSVC_LINK"):$PATH" && cargo install --git https://github.com/arghhhhh/unity-cli.git; else echo 'MSVC Build Tools not found — install via: winget install Microsoft.VisualStudio.2022.BuildTools --override "--quiet --wait --add Microsoft.VisualStudio.Workload.VCTools --includeRecommended"' && false; fi

integration_test.description: Unity Editor must be running with com.akiojin.unity-cli-bridge package installed
